title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how they are adopting AI coding tools at scale. The panel covers workflow changes, productivity measurement, and observes that AI is reshaping the software development lifecycle with engineers spending less time on coding and more on other tasks.
